verdict_reason: The forced AMQP_WEB_SOCKETS transport fixes the CDP proxy issue but breaks the emulator-backed integration test and local compose flow — CI is red on the current commit with the happy-path send IT timing out.

todos.issue: Unconditional .transportType(AMQP_WEB_SOCKETS) (added to resolve item 7) is incompatible with the Service Bus emulator, which only accepts plain AMQP on 5672 — the websocket handshake hangs (WebSocketsConnectionHandler stuck at onConnectionLocalOpen), EventsSendControllerIT.post_shouldReturnAccepted_andMessageLandsInQueue times out after 30s, and CI is red on commit 4c1e745 (run 27358009070); the same hang affects the compose emulator dev flow
todos.fix: Make the transport configurable — e.g. add a transport-type field to AzureServiceBusConfig defaulting to AMQP_WEB_SOCKETS, and override to AMQP in application-local.yml, compose.yml and the integration-test profile so the emulator path works while deployed CDP traffic still tunnels over 443 via the egress proxy
